ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round the game was played in */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory for the winning team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire officiating the game */,
  "umpire_2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire officiating the game */,
  "umpire_3" TEXT /* Name of the third umpire officiating the game */,
  "crowd_favorites" TEXT /* Team that the crowd favored */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game mapping */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "position_played" TEXT /* Position the player played in the specific game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "substitution_in_time" INTEGER /* Time of substitution into the game (if applicable) */,
  "substitution_out_time" INTEGER /* Time of substitution out of the game (if applicable) */,
  "yellow_card" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player received a yellow card */,
  "red_card" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player received a red card */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player was injured during the game */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_map_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_map_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home ground */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the current captain */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* List of assistant coaches */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team's uniform */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, coach) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
